ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer was added */,
  "credit_limit" INTEGER /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "days_grace" INTEGER /* Number of days for payment grace period */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is active or not */,
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer type */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "customer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "sales_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent involved in the interaction */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_agents" (
  "sales_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the sales agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the sales agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the sales agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_managers" (
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the account manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the account manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the account manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "sales_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent who handled the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target audience */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the target audience */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., age, location) */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographics of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance record */,
  "sales_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent associated with the sales performance */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated during the period */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_agent_id") REFERENCES sales_agents ("sales_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer behavior record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the behavior */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior (e.g., purchase, interaction) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_behavior_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data security record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., customer, sales) */,
  "encryption_method" TEXT /* Encryption method used */,
  "access_controls" TEXT /* Access controls in place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the order item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the membership */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment associated with the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_memberships_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_memberships_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)
